examples.text: During my last outing, I was surprised to see how much of the area was shaped by ancient volcanoes and geological forces, much of which remains today, giving the area a unique feel and painting a colorful background for great photographs.
examples.explanation: 在我上次外出时，我惊讶地发现该地区有多少是由古代火山和地质作用塑造的，其中大部分至今仍保留着，赋予了该地区独特的风貌，并为拍摄出色的照片提供了色彩斑斓的背景。

reviewSessions.example_text: During my last outing, I was surprised to see how much of the area was shaped by ancient volcanoes and geological forces, much of which remains today, giving the area a unique feel and painting a colorful background for great photographs.
